community.title: Cleared for new flight levels!
content: This year I went all in — I now work full time on MobiFlight to push the project to next levels.
Your financial support is crucial to cover my living costs and sustain ongoing development.

community.title: New products in the MobiFlight Store
content: Check out the latest additions to our store, including new modules and accessories to enhance your flight simulation experience.

community.title: Subscribe to Our Newsletter
content: Stay up-to-date with the **latest news, tutorials, and community highlights** by subscribing to [our newsletter](https://mobiflight.com/newsletter).
